'''Jakan Arms''' was a company that manufactured anti-vehicle defensive emplacements. They produced the [[222 Blaster Cannon]], which was used by the [[Imperial Military/Legends|military]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during its reign over the [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Goroth Prime/Legends|Goroth Prime]].<ref name="Goroth" />
